## Type of change

<!-- Select every option that applies. -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 This change requires a documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Maintenance or repository tooling change

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Racerx323/homelab-scripts/blob/main/.github/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have checked for credentials, private endpoints, SIDs, and machine-specific paths
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation where required
- [ ] All applicable pre-commit checks pass locally
- [ ] I have documented installation, verification, and rollback where applicable
- [ ] I have tested Windows-specific behavior on a supported Windows system, or documented why I could not
